final_value.note: The official Paygent site content on the English homepage is marketing/product oriented and does not provide public developer documentation or any described API authentication method (no mention of API keys, OAuth, tokens, signatures, etc.).

final_value.note: The official products page describes Paygent offerings and features but does not link to or include public API documentation, endpoint references, SDKs, or a developer portal; any API surface (if it exists) is not publicly documented on this page.

pass1_value.note: Public developer documentation and self-serve API credential issuance are not available on the official site; integration likely requires contacting Paygent or becoming a partner.
